label: Nextra: Docs Starter Kit
description: Simple, powerful and flexible markdown-powered docs site. Built with Next.js.
summary: Use this dossier when building a documentation or knowledge-base site in Next.js where MDX files are the source of truth and Nextra provides docs navigation, theming, and page layout. It provides the minimal Nextra v3 integration pattern: Next.js config, theme config, and starter MDX content structure.
_deprecationReason: Source repo last pushed 637d ago, but Nextra v3 itself is current. Re-curate against https://github.com/shuding/nextra/tree/main/examples/docs (canonical Nextra v3 example) instead of the old starter-kit.
